findings.issue: Builder likely moved to archive accidentally. code-index.json has current timestamp but zero content — indicates silent failure or incorrect file path resolution. No error raised during build suggests missing validation.
findings.recommended_fix: Verify code_index.py is in active path not archive. Re-instate if misplaced. Add build validation: if module count or endpoint count is 0, fail with error. Add to CI: check code-index.json size > threshold.
